description: GardenWorld's operations team needs to formally define the Bill of Materials for the Patio Set product to support manufacturing and warehouse assembly processes. As GardenAdmin for the GardenWorld client, create a new Bill of Materials for the 'Patio Set' product with the Search Key 'PS-BOM-2024', Name 'Patio Set Assembly', BOM Type 'Current Active', and BOM Use 'Manufacturing'. Include two active component lines: 4 units of 'Patio Chair' and 1 unit of 'Patio Table'.
